name: Transaction Coordinator Service
next_task: Access email for 6453 Mahogany Peak (Pam Patterson) to pull contract documents into TC system
current_focus: Transaction intake for 6453 Mahogany Peak — first real client transaction
completion_checks: First live transaction (6453 Mahogany Peak) created and tracked in DB
Email triage picks up TC-related emails and routes to correct transaction
Deadline tracker fires reminders at correct intervals
Agent portal accessible and shows transaction status
GLVAR dues check runs monthly without manual intervention
Billing tracks per-transaction and subscription revenue
anti_drift_notes: TC coordinator uses SkySlope for document management via Okta SSO browser automation. The Gmail credentials for TC email access are stored as Railway variables (email address as key, password as value). SkySlope automation requires Puppeteer on Railway — not yet deployed.

decision_debt.description: Email access for TC requires Gmail app password — not yet configured in Railway
SkySlope browser automation (Puppeteer) not yet deployed on Railway
Billing/Stripe integration not wired to TC plan tiers yet
